title: Mano Prakash Parthasarathi
text:
I am a second-year PhD student in the Department of Computer Science at North Carolina State University. I am fortunate to work with Dr. Sharma Thankachan.



My research interests lie broadly in the field of Algorithms, with a particular focus on String and Graph algorithms. These areas fascinate me due to their fundamental importance in computer science and their wide-ranging applications in various disciplines.



You can reach out to me via mpartha @ ncsu . edu . Please feel free to reach out!
